overall_summary: The ElizaOS community is currently experiencing high tension due to the token hitting all-time lows, causing the team to pivot from technical development to community management and transparency efforts. Despite the market downturn, development continues on the Spartan Degen AI and a universal cloud autoscaling solution for agents.
key_facts: The ELIZAOS token reached new all-time lows on March 7, 2026, leading to widespread community anxiety.
PR #266 was submitted to introduce the xproof plugin for on-chain audit trails for ElizaOS agents.
A universal autoscaling solution for Eliza agents with multi-client support (WhatsApp, Telegram, SMS) is under development by Stan ⚡.
Core Dev Odilitime confirmed that no legitimate Milady token has been launched yet despite community speculation.
The team is creating a tracking list for users who missed the 90-day ai16z to elizaOS token migration deadline.
Odilitime clarified the distinction between team actions and Shaw's individual 2.6% token holdings to address selling concerns.
The SAID Protocol was integrated into the core framework to provide agents with verifiable digital identities on Solana.
A new enforcement mechanism for agent-to-vendor credit lines involving bond posting and atomic slashing was proposed by N0vaMp4.
open_questions: Is the team interested in OTC investment?
Why doesn't the team do buybacks when prices are depressed?
Have you ever had an agent exhaust its balance mid-task and leave you with unpaid compute?

new_issues_prs.title: xproof plugin for on-chain audit trails
new_issues_prs.author: jasonxkensei
new_issues_prs.significance: Enables certified agent decisions with built-in compliance gating and on-chain trails.

new_issues_prs.title: Database refactor to improve long-term architecture
new_issues_prs.author: unknown
new_issues_prs.significance: Major overhaul to make the system faster and more reliable for beta launch.

overall_focus.claim: Focus on clearing functional blockers for the official beta launch, including dashboard bug fixes and removing text limits.
Integration of decentralized identity standards through the SAID Protocol across the core framework and plugin registry.

discord_updates.summary: Heavy focus on token price depression and team commitment. Overlapped with clarifications on project status (Spartan Degen AI, Cloud) and the non-existence of a legitimate Milady token.
Low technical activity; discussions primarily focused on a new xproof plugin and a proposed agent-to-vendor credit line mechanism.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Community members are frustrated by missed 2025 shipping deadlines and a perceived lack of marketing as the token hits new lows.
Users requested a solution for late migration of ai16z tokens after the 90-day window closed.

strategic_insights.insight: There is a significant disconnect between the team's internal development progress and the community's perception based on token price.
implications_or_questions: Should the team implement the suggested buyback program?
How can the team practically demonstrate shipping progress to alleviate FUD?

market_analysis.observation: The ELIZAOS token has exhibited 'stablecoin-like' price behavior for 10 days before reaching new all-time lows.
market_analysis.relevance: Indicates a period of stagnation followed by a breakdown in investor confidence.
